reasoning: The document contains 1 major defect regarding missing semantic list markup inside table cells (literal bullet characters used instead of proper markdown list syntax), which breaks accessibility for screen readers. The automated signals confirm this is a clean document in terms of text preservation, but the structural markup issue requires human intervention to correct. Routing to HUMAN_REVIEW based on 1 major defect.

concerns.analysis: The PDF contains bulleted lists under several agenda topics. In the JSON output, these lists are represented using literal bullet characters ('•') and newlines within the table cell text. Because they are not converted using proper markdown list syntax ('*' or '-'), they will be rendered as plain text strings rather than semantic HTML lists (<ul>/<li>), which breaks accessibility for screen readers.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 1 table(s) have time values in <th> cells: "10:00-10:05"
concerns.analysis: data_in_th_time=1, no_th_tables=0. Minor semantic markup issues: tables lack <th> elements or use time values as headers. These affect screen reader context but are less severe than data misrepresentation.

Review table headers to ensure time values are appropriately marked up or moved to data cells if necessary.
